contrast_verification.summary: All 7 text/background combinations pass WCAG AA (4.5:1). Primary text on bg exceeds 17:1 target at 18.14:1.

tasks.name: Add homepage dark-mode color tokens
tasks.purpose: Define CSS custom properties for the homepage dark-mode palette under [data-marketing] scope

constraints: Tokens must be scoped under [data-marketing] selector
Use CSS custom properties (not Tailwind config)
Follow existing token naming pattern from shadcn-ui.css

tasks.input_state: globals.css contains typography tokens but no dark-mode color tokens for homepage
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains [data-marketing] scoped CSS custom properties for: --homepage-bg (#0a0a0f), --homepage-surface, --homepage-surface-elevated, --homepage-border, --homepage-border-subtle, --homepage-text (#f5f5f7), --homepage-text-muted, --homepage-accent (#24a9e0), --homepage-accent-glow
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All 9 homepage color tokens exist in globals.css under [data-marketing] selector with exact color values specified
tasks.verification_command: grep -E '(--homepage-bg|--homepage-surface|--homepage-border|--homepage-text|--homepage-accent)' apps/web/styles/globals.css && grep '#0a0a0f' apps/web/styles/globals.css && grep '#24a9e0' apps/web/styles/globals.css && grep '#f5f5f7' apps/web/styles/globals.css && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add homepage gradient token definitions
tasks.purpose: Define CSS custom properties for gradient effects used throughout the homepage

constraints: Tokens must be scoped under [data-marketing] selector
Gradients must reference color tokens from T1
Use CSS custom properties for gradient definitions

tasks.input_state: globals.css has homepage color tokens but no gradient definitions
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains --homepage-gradient-accent (cyan-to-blue gradient) and --homepage-gradient-surface (surface-to-transparent gradient) under [data-marketing]
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Both gradient tokens exist in globals.css and reference T1 color tokens
tasks.verification_command: grep -E '(--homepage-gradient-accent|--homepage-gradient-surface)' apps/web/styles/globals.css && grep 'linear-gradient' apps/web/styles/globals.css && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create glowPulse keyframe animation
tasks.purpose: Add pulsing glow animation for CTAs and highlights using the homepage accent color

constraints: Follow existing keyframe pattern from accordion/fade animations
Add --animate-glow-pulse utility in @theme block
Use transform and opacity for GPU acceleration
Duration should be 2-3 seconds for subtle effect

tasks.input_state: theme.css has existing keyframes (accordion, fade) but no glowPulse animation
tasks.output_state: theme.css contains @keyframes glowPulse definition and --animate-glow-pulse utility class
tasks.acceptance_criterion: glowPulse keyframe exists in theme.css with pulsing glow effect using accent color, and --animate-glow-pulse utility is defined
tasks.verification_command: grep 'glowPulse' apps/web/styles/theme.css && grep '--animate-glow-pulse' apps/web/styles/theme.css && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create borderRotate keyframe animation
tasks.purpose: Add rotating gradient border animation for featured cards

constraints: Follow existing keyframe pattern from accordion/fade animations
Add --animate-border-rotate utility in @theme block
Use transform for GPU acceleration
Duration should be 3-4 seconds for smooth rotation

tasks.input_state: theme.css has glowPulse keyframe but no borderRotate animation
tasks.output_state: theme.css contains @keyframes borderRotate definition and --animate-border-rotate utility class
tasks.acceptance_criterion: borderRotate keyframe exists in theme.css with rotating gradient border effect, and --animate-border-rotate utility is defined
tasks.verification_command: grep 'borderRotate' apps/web/styles/theme.css && grep '--animate-border-rotate' apps/web/styles/theme.css && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Extend GradientText with cyan variant
tasks.purpose: Add variant prop to GradientText component supporting cyan-to-blue gradient for homepage

constraints: Maintain backward compatibility (default variant)
Use union type for variant prop: 'default' | 'cyan'
Cyan variant should use --homepage-gradient-accent token
Follow existing component patterns from other UI components

tasks.input_state: GradientText component exists with single default gradient style, no variant prop
tasks.output_state: GradientText component has variant prop with 'default' and 'cyan' options, cyan variant uses homepage accent gradient
tasks.acceptance_criterion: GradientText has TypeScript variant prop with 'default' | 'cyan' options, cyan variant applies cyan-to-blue gradient

tasks.name: Verify text contrast ratios
tasks.purpose: Ensure all text/background combinations meet WCAG AA accessibility standards

constraints: Primary text on background must be >= 17:1 contrast ratio
Muted text on background must be >= 4.5:1 contrast ratio (WCAG AA)
Document results in feature.md or tasks.json metadata
Use contrast checker tool or manual calculation

tasks.input_state: Homepage color tokens defined but contrast ratios not verified
tasks.output_state: Contrast ratios verified and documented: #f5f5f7 on #0a0a0f meets 17:1+, muted text on #0a0a0f meets 4.5:1+
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Contrast ratios documented with pass/fail status for all text/background combinations
